_comment: Ticklisto Configuration File - Copy this to config.json and customize
_time_zone_help: IANA time zone name (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo). Used for displaying due dates/times and scheduling reminders in your local time.
_default_reminder_offsets_help: Default reminder times in minutes before due time. Applied automatically when creating tasks with due_time. Examples: 15 (15 min), 60 (1 hour), 1440 (1 day), 10080 (1 week).
_email_recipient_help: Email address to receive task reminders. Must match the Gmail account used for OAuth authentication.
_daily_digest_time_help: Time to send daily digest of pending reminders in HH:MM format (24-hour). Example: '08:00' for 8:00 AM, '17:30' for 5:30 PM.
